title: pedicularis bicornuta var. bicornuta
intro: Pedicularis bicornuta var. bicornuta, also known as the two-horned lousewort, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Pedicularis bicornuta var. bicornuta is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its roots and leaves can be dried and used in traditional Chinese medicine.
